channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: FBI says hackers have stolen $262 million in account takeover scams in 2025 so far - here's how you can stay safe
item.description: Cybercriminals have stolen hundreds of millions through AI-driven phishing, fake stores, and account takeover scams targeting users across financial platforms.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: How to watch Clarke vs TKV online for FREE: live stream boxing tonight; fight card and ringwalks, weigh-in results
item.description: All the ways to watch Clarke vs TKV live streams online, including for free, as the pair clash in Derby, UK, with the British heavyweight title on the line.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: Will Amazon refund you if Black Friday prices drop further? Here’s how it compares to other retailers
item.description: Some retailers in the US and the UK will give you money back if something you've bought then gets a further discount.
item.dc:creator: David Nield, TechRadar

item.title: Love Marvel and DC? Grab these Disney+ and HBO Max deals with over 60% off for Black Friday
item.description: I'm getting my Black Friday superhero film fix with these HBO Max and Disney+ offers that pack a cost-cutting punch.
item.dc:creator: Tom Power, TechRadar

item.title: This cheap, compact projector can turn your wall into a giant whiteboard – and it has gesture controls too
item.description: The Choice Bee AI Projector Air supports a stylus and comes in at an extremely low price, so we really hope it gets a global launch.
item.dc:creator: James Rogerson, TechRadar

item.title: Security researchers caution app developers about risks in using Google Antigravity
item.description: Google’s Antigravity development tool for creating artificial intelligence agents has been out for less than 11 days and already the company has been forced to update the known issues pages after security researchers discovered what they say are vulnerabilities.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI could play a big role in this year’s Black Friday
item.description: Black Friday isn’t what it used to be. Less than 15 years ago, it was fairly common for people to wake up at ridiculously early hours to drive to a store, where they would stand in line, waiting for the doors to open in order to grab the best deals.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Agentic cloud ops with the new Azure Copilot
item.description: Microsoft unveiled its awkwardly named Copilot in Azure back in 2024. That was followed by the Azure Model Context Protocol Server, called from the GitHub Copilot agent in Visual Studio Code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Four important lessons about context engineering
item.description: Context engineering has emerged as one of the most critical skills in working with large language models (LLMs). While much attention has been paid to prompt engineering, the art and science of managing context—i.e.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: What comes next for federal workers after AI takes over the mundane tasks
item.description: "Who is going to leverage the proper tools out there to accomplish the job in the most efficient, effective and cost-based area? That's key," Bob Venero said. The post What comes next for federal workers after AI takes over the mundane tasks first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: HP to slash up to 6,000 jobs as component costs and AI reshape operations
item.description: HP announced plans to eliminate between 4,000 and 6,000 positions by 2028 as part of what it described as an AI-driven transformation to save $1 billion, while warning that surging memory chip costs would squeeze margins in the second half of 2026.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How LinkedIn is using AI to improve its job-search features
item.description: It’s an unfortunate reality of today’s job market: many would-be hires spend days scouring job descriptions and blasting applications to each opportunity they find.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Boeing’s troubled Starliner won’t carry astronauts on its next mission
item.description: Boeing and NASA have agreed to keep astronauts off the company’s next Starliner flight and instead perform a trial run with cargo to prove its safety. Monday’s announcement comes eight months after the first and only Starliner crew returned to Earth aboard SpaceX after a prolonged mission.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company
